review: One of the best books I've read this year. The author's writing is vivid and immersive — I finished it in two sittings. The character development is exceptional and the ending left me genuinely emotional. Already ordered the sequel.

examples.review: Absolute trash. Poorly written, boring plot, total waste of money.
It was fine. Not great, not terrible. A decent read to pass the time.
A masterpiece. Every page pulled me deeper in. One of the best books I've ever read.
